comment: Pipe-connectable indicator overlay for the Covered Vacuum Pipe. Loaded as a standalone model and appended to the dynamic baked model's collectParts output (NeoForgeClientSetup.onModifyBakingResult / CoveredPipeBakedModel). Cube_all gives us 6 faces with the indicator texture; cutout render_type means transparent indicator pixels punch through to the camo quads underneath so the wrapped block stays visible.
